title: Lead SEO Specialist at Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates!
